title: Inside Iran's war tunnel: Huge collection of drones displayed under Khamenei's images - watch
summary_full: Iran's Revolutionary Guard launched its 48th wave of retaliatory strikes, "Operation True Promise 4," targeting Israeli and US interests. State media showcased drone launches and an underground arsenal, reporting attacks on northern Israel, including Haifa, and American bases. The IRGC claimed to have hit Qatar's al-Udaid airbase, asserting it caused panic in Israel.
